_comment: Desired classic branch-protection state for `main`. Source of truth for the rc->main release edge; apply with: gh api --method PUT repos/:owner/:repo/branches/main/protection --input .github/branch-protection/main.json  (strip _comment keys first, see scripts/apply-main-protection.sh). Matches the classic-protection style already used on develop/rc. required_linear_history is FALSE on purpose: the flow merges with --no-ff merge commits (git-flow), which linear history would forbid.
